description: Screen definitions evaluated against the unified signal lookup (technical signals + fundamentals + flow). A stock matches a screen when ALL criteria are true. Tune the thresholds in this file; no code changes required.

screens.name: momentum_breakout
screens.label: Momentum Breakout
screens.description: Price near 52-week high on above-average volume with healthy (not yet overbought) RSI and a confirmed trend.

screens.name: quality_at_value
screens.label: Quality at Value
screens.description: Profitable, growing companies trading at reasonable valuations with conservative leverage.

screens.name: fii_accumulation
screens.label: FII Accumulation
screens.description: Stocks holding above their long-term trend while FIIs have been net buyers in the cash segment for several consecutive sessions.

screens.name: rsi_oversold_bounce
screens.label: RSI Oversold Bounce
screens.description: Mean-reversion setup: deeply oversold RSI on stocks still in a long-term uptrend, ideal for a swing entry once momentum turns.

screens.name: golden_cross
screens.label: Golden Cross
screens.description: Classic long-term trend confirmation: 50-day moving average above the 200-day with price above both — a stable uptrend regime.

screens.name: volume_breakout
screens.label: Volume Breakout
screens.description: Sharp 3x-plus volume spike with a positive close — typically marks accumulation or news-driven momentum.

screens.name: dividend_compounder
screens.label: Dividend Compounder
screens.description: High-quality dividend payers at reasonable valuations — the bedrock of a long-only Indian portfolio.
